title: euphrasia nemorosa subsp. rigidula
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. rigidula is a subspecies of the Euphrasia nemorosa, also known as the woodland eyebright, a type of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. rigidula are said to include soothing eye irritation, reducing swelling, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. rigidula can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or eye wash, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
